3 pumps of caramel sauce
In a measuring cup:
2 espresso shots
Milk to 8 oz
Pour measuring cup into blender, lid on
Blend on 4
In the drink cup:
Caramel drizzle
Pour blended drink into the drink cup
*If requested, add whipped cream

● Small (12 oz)
In a hot drink cup:
1 1/2 (one and a half) small scoops mocha powder
1/4 (one quarter) pumps of caramel sauce
1 espresso shot
WHISK THOROUGHLY
In a measuring cup:
Whole milk to 10 oz
2 oz of Maui Milk
Transfer into steaming pitcher
Steam to desired temperature
Pour steamed milk into hot drink cup
Caramel drizzle around rim and on top of drink
Thin layer of Kona Cloud

● Medium (16 oz)

2 small scoops mocha powder

WHISK THOROUGHLY
In a measuring cup:
Whole milk to 12 oz
2 oz of Maui Milk
Transfer into steaming pitcher
Steam to desired temperature
Pour steamed milk into hot drink cup
Caramel drizzle around rim and on top of drink
Thin layer of Kona Cloud

WHISK THOROUGHLY
